name: MOKUTON: SHICHURO NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: FOUR PILLAR PRISON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 17

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, E, H, Mas

Shichuurou no Jutsu is a unique Ninjutsu technique using the Mokuton element. After forming the necessary hand seals, beams of wood will emerge from the ground. These beams will converge and combine to form a very resistant prison. The cubic prison is 25 feet large and 25 feet high. The DC to Break a "bar" of this prison is and escape is 30. It has a hardness of 10; an earth and water resistance of 10, a wood resistance of 30, and every section of 5 ft. has 50 hit points. A creature may also attempt to escape with an Escape Artist check (DC 30). A creature may avoid being trapped inside the prison by succeeding in a reflex saving throw. If the save is successful, the target stands adjacent to the prison after it is formed. The prison lasts for 1 hour per level, and can be dismissed if the user so wishes.

Requires: Kantoku no Jutsu (3)

Effect: 1 cubic-shaped prison

Expendable Component: Expendable Component -Nearby wood to form the barrier.

Mastery: Each level of mastery on this technique increases the DC to break and escape artist checks by one, and the hit points of the prison by 5.
